# La Coruna

> Geotechnical engineering company in Chile, providing professional services in soil mechanics, foundation engineering and site investigation.

## Services
- [Aislacion Sismica](https://la-coruna.geotecnia.vip/aislacion-sismica/)
- [Anclajes](https://la-coruna.geotecnia.vip/anclajes/)
- [Asentamiento Diferencial](https://la-coruna.geotecnia.vip/asentamiento-diferencial/)
- [Asentamientos](https://la-coruna.geotecnia.vip/asentamientos/)
- [Calicatas Exploratorias](https://la-coruna.geotecnia.vip/calicatas-exploratorias/)
- [Capacidad De Carga](https://la-coruna.geotecnia.vip/capacidad-de-carga/)
- [Cbr Vial](https://la-coruna.geotecnia.vip/cbr-vial/)
- [Cimentaciones](https://la-coruna.geotecnia.vip/cimentaciones/)
- [Cimentaciones Sismicas](https://la-coruna.geotecnia.vip/cimentaciones-sismicas/)
- [Cimentaciones Superficiales](https://la-coruna.geotecnia.vip/cimentaciones-superficiales/)
- [Clasificacion Suelos](https://la-coruna.geotecnia.vip/clasificacion-suelos/)
- [Compactacion Dinamica](https://la-coruna.geotecnia.vip/compactacion-dinamica/)
- [Consolidacion](https://la-coruna.geotecnia.vip/consolidacion/)
- [Densidad Cono Arena](https://la-coruna.geotecnia.vip/densidad-cono-arena/)

- [Dilatometro](https://la-coruna.geotecnia.vip/dilatometro/)

- [Excavaciones Subterraneas](https://la-coruna.geotecnia.vip/excavaciones-subterraneas/)

## Contact
- Website: https://la-coruna.geotecnia.vip/

## About
This page provides information about geotechnical engineering services available in Chile.
The company complies with local and international standards including ASTM, ISO and country-specific norms.
